2026-04-09T01:04:06.9153926Z changes and commit them, and you can discard any commits you make in this
2026-04-09T01:04:06.9156239Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.
2026-04-09T01:04:06.9157252Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:06.9157859Z If you want to create a new branch to retain commits you create, you may
2026-04-09T01:04:06.9159361Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-09T01:04:06.9160250Z 
2026-04-09T01:04:06.9160581Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-09T01:04:06.9161289Z

2026-04-09T01:04:06.9162141Z
